title: Chat Selection
description: A simple client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 26.1.2 that lets you select and copy chat messages with your mouse and keyboard.
body:
# Chat Selection

A simple client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 26.1.2 that lets you select and copy chat messages with your mouse and keyboard.

## Features

- Click and drag to select chat text
- Copy selected text to clipboard
- Word-by-word selection with Ctrl + Arrow Keys
